{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apleezinaju es pahr
juhs schodeen Debbeſi un Sem-
mi / ka juhs bohja eefect peepe-
fchi no tahs Semmes Wirſus/ ue
kurren juhs pahr to Jardanu eetat
winnu eemantoht / juhs tur igi
ne palikfeet wirfu / bet ar Isdel-
deſchann juhs tapfeet isdelseti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS iſkat-
tihs juhs ſtarp teem Laudim/ un
juhs tapfeet weens inas Pulzinsch
ſtarp teem Paganeeim atlizzina-
ti/ us kurren juhs tas KUNGS
dſihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tur falpoſeet juhs tah-
deem Deeweem/kas ZilweſuRoh-
ka Darbs irr/ Kohks un Almins/
kas ne reds/ nedg dsird/ nedg ehd/
nedg fa-obſch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad meklefeet juhs no tur-
renes to KUNGU juhsu Deewu/
un atraſfeet to/ kad tu no wiﬀas
tawas Sirgs / un no wiﬀas ta-
waz Dwehſeleſ mekleht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tu speests tapſt/ un
wiſtas ſchihs Leetas tew notiks
pehdigas Deenas / tad atgreesi-
fees tu us to KUNGU tawu Dee-
wu/ un klaufiti winna Balkſni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas STIPRAJS
SCHELIJS DEEWS/
TAS KUNGS LAWS
DEEWS ne atſahs tew / nedg
tew isdeldehs/nedg atsmirtihs ta-
wu Tehwu Derribu / fo wiſch
teem swehejs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo waiza jelle pehz teem
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "pagahjuſcheem Laikeem / ka
preekſch teuis irr bijuſchi/no tah
Deenas / kad Deews to Zilweſ-
wirs Semnes raddijs irr / n
weena Debbes Galla lihds oh
fram / arrig tahda leela Leeta in
notikkusi/ ka fchi/ jeb dsirdeta tap
puſi lihds ka fcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Arrig jebkahdi Laudis t
Deewa Balkſni dsirdejschi irr n
Ugguns Widdus runnajam/ itti
ka tu effi dsirdejs/ un buhtu dsib
wi palikkuſchi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jeb arrig Deews irr ap
nehmces eet few weenu Taut
uemdams no to ZaſchuWiddus
zaur Kahrdinaschanahm / zau
Sihmehm / un zaur Brihnu
meem / un zaur Karzu / un zau
weenu ſtipru Rohku / un zau
weenu iſſkeepnu Elkonn/ un zau
leelahm Istruhzinaschanahm /
pehz wiﬀu/ fo tas KUNGS juh-
fu Deews jums preekſch jubfahm
Azzim darrijs irr Egiptes-Sem
me.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew irr tas rahdihts / k
tu ſinnatu/ ka tas KUNGS pa
Deewu irr / ne weens wairaf/ ka
wiſch ween.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No Debbeſ irr wiſch ten
lizzis fawu Balkſni dsirdeht/ ten
pamahzidams/ un wirs Semnee
irr wiſch tew fawu leelu Ugguns
rahdtjs/ un tu effi winna Wahrs
dus no Ugguns Widdus dsirdejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tapehz ka wiſch tawue
Tehwns bij miſtejs / un wiſch
Oſimmumu pehz wiſſeeim irr is-
redſejs/ tad irr wiſch teiv ar fa-
"
    }
  ],
